programme.title: Choir Games
programme.desc: Choirs take the stage; know if the judges respond to their repertoires or illness cancels their dreams.

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: When Tiffany's fiancé calls off their wedding, she's heartbroken that her dream wedding is cancelled. Tiffany convinces unsuccessful actor Nicholas to pretend to be her fiancé in exchange for signing him to her agency, and the dream wedding happens for someone.

programme.title: Crossroad Springs
programme.desc: On Easter Sunday, James opens the Cowboy Church as faith calls for sacrifice, forgiveness, and hope amid a quiet threat to the ranch's future.

programme.title: Choir Games
programme.desc: Choirs take the stage; know if the judges respond to their repertoires or illness cancels their dreams.

programme.title: A Match for the Prince
programme.desc: A medieval romance novelist is hired to be a matchmaker for a real-life prince in a desperate attempt to find true love before the fixed royal wedding date.

programme.title: Grounded in Love
programme.desc: When a flight attendant loses her job, she returns to her grandma's farm to replant her roots as feelings resurface with her childhood best friend.

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: When Tiffany's fiancé calls off their wedding, she's heartbroken that her dream wedding is cancelled. Tiffany convinces unsuccessful actor Nicholas to pretend to be her fiancé in exchange for signing him to her agency, and the dream wedding happens for someone.

programme.title: Crossroad Springs
programme.desc: On Easter Sunday, James opens the Cowboy Church as faith calls for sacrifice, forgiveness, and hope amid a quiet threat to the ranch's future.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou must contend with the new ranch hand and a threatening food truck when she returns from New York.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou is trapped at the ranch with the new ranch hand, Mitch.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lemonade Stand Romance
programme.desc: Locals and the media stand up to authorities when they shut down a girl's lemonade stand.

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: When a no-nonsense consultant is blindsided by her boss's switch to a greener, more natural office space, she'll partner with the rooftop florist to make her building come alive with the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: One in a Million
programme.desc: Oliver (Eric Mabius) and Shane (Kristin Booth) explore their budding romance, while a woman asks the Postables to retrieve a letter that she mailed to her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou must contend with the new ranch hand and a threatening food truck when she returns from New York.

programme.desc: When a no-nonsense consultant is blindsided by her boss's switch to a greener, more natural office space, she'll partner with the rooftop florist to make her building come alive with the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: One in a Million
programme.desc: Oliver (Eric Mabius) and Shane (Kristin Booth) explore their budding romance, while a woman asks the Postables to retrieve a letter that she mailed to her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Novel Murders
programme.desc: Antiques expert Jennifer Shannon believes two items found at the scene of a murder are actually clues straight out of famous mystery stories.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Passport to Love
programme.desc: Travel blogger Nicole meets Kade, a competing magazine rep while travelling abroad. When Kade's boss tasks him with buying her out, he struggles between doing his job and his growing feelings for Nicole.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: The day of the long-awaited trial arrives for Bill and Nathan; Lucas contemplates his future.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: At the Hope Valley Harvest Festival, the community reflects on all they've gained after loss, as they look towards the future.

programme.title: The Love Advisor
programme.desc: A lowly assistant secretly writes the love advice for her boss' podcast. When she learns her favorite journalist is a fan of the show, she must decide if love is worth putting her career at risk.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Novel Murders
programme.desc: Antiques expert Jennifer Shannon believes two items found at the scene of a murder are actually clues straight out of famous mystery stories.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Amy helps Cass handle a spirited horse, a lot rides on their success.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty celebrate their anniversary.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: You Can't Teach Love
programme.desc: When publicist, Elizabeth, finds herself unexpectedly caring for her niece for a few weeks, she struggles to balance it all and finds unforeseen support from her niece's kindergarten teacher, Jamie.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: Allie führt ein Café gegenüber ihrer ehrgeizigen Cousine Marily, und beide wetteifern um das beste Café. Als Prinz Henry in die Stadt kommt, fordert er sie zu einem Wettbewerb um das legendäre Familienrezept ihrer Großmutter, um den perfekten Krönungskuchen für die Hochzeit seines Bruders zu backen. Während Allie fair bleibt, ist Marily bereit, zu schummeln, um zu gewinnen.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: Lost Without You
programme.desc: A strange package containing what may be someone's bucket list shows up in a prop mailbox on a commercial set. A straight-laced postal detective attempts to track down its intended recipient.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Amy helps Cass handle a spirited horse, a lot rides on their success.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty celebrate their anniversary.

programme.title: You Can't Teach Love
programme.desc: When publicist, Elizabeth, finds herself unexpectedly caring for her niece for a few weeks, she struggles to balance it all and finds unforeseen support from her niece's kindergarten teacher, Jamie.

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off
programme.desc: Allie führt ein Café gegenüber ihrer ehrgeizigen Cousine Marily, und beide wetteifern um das beste Café. Als Prinz Henry in die Stadt kommt, fordert er sie zu einem Wettbewerb um das legendäre Familienrezept ihrer Großmutter, um den perfekten Krönungskuchen für die Hochzeit seines Bruders zu backen. Während Allie fair bleibt, ist Marily bereit, zu schummeln, um zu gewinnen.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: Lost Without You
programme.desc: A strange package containing what may be someone's bucket list shows up in a prop mailbox on a commercial set. A straight-laced postal detective attempts to track down its intended recipient.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Art of Murder
programme.desc: Jennifer, a garage sale shopping expert with sharp observation skills, helps the local police department investigate crimes and solve mysteries. While arranging a charity garage sale event, Jennifer finds a body in the attic of a local residence. At first she thinks the cause of death was an accidental fall, but when she learns that the victim was trying to call 911, she begins to suspect foul play.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Proposal Spot
programme.desc: The owner of a café where everyone falls in love could lose everything when a major celebrity proposes and gets dumped, so she vows to get him and his would-be fiancée back together, only to fall for him herself.

programme.title: How to Win a Prince
programme.desc: A perennially single dating coach attempts to seduce a prince as she helps him navigate the cut-throat NYC dating scene.

programme.title: Been There All Along
programme.desc: After her public breakup, Charley, determined founder of a dating app, is near bankruptcy. She teams up with Liam, a self-assured and innovative marketing expert, to save her company.
